name: Empire Metals Corp.
summary: Empire Metals Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for lithium, potassium, boron, bromine, magnesium, platinum, palladium, graphite, nickel, and gold. It holds a 70% interests in the Fox Creek Lithium project, which consists of 37 certain metallic and industrial mineral permits covering an area of approximately 278,431.02 hector located in Alberta, Canada. The company also holds a 100% interests in the Buck Lake project and the Gwyn Lake gold property located in Thunder Bay, Ontario, as well as 30% interest in the Beardmore Gold Property. In addition, it has an option agreement to acquire an 80% interest in the Graphite West project located in Ontario, Canada. The company was formerly known as Empire Rock Minerals Inc. and changed its name to Empire Metals Corp. in February 2017. Empire Metals Corp. was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
